name: Louisiana Tofu Citron
recipeIngredient: 1 medium green (or red) bell pepper, diced
recipeInstructions:
Original recipe called for 1/4 cup grapefruit juice. I needed at least twice that amount.
1. Cut the tofu into 1" squares.
2. Melt the butter and oil in a skillet over medium heat.
3. Add the onion and garlic to the skillet, sautéing until softened, about 5 minutes.
4. Dredge each tofu square in flour until fully coated.
5. Remove from the skillet and set aside.
6. Return the skillet to low heat and add the tofu squares, cooking until browned on all sides, about 12-15 minutes.
7. Stir in the grapefruit juice, lemon rind, cayenne, honey, and salt; mix well.
8. Cover and simmer over low to medium heat for 10 minutes.
9. Add the bell pepper and mushrooms; continue simmering, covered, an additional 10 minutes.
